articles.description: Addressing a rally at Suri in Birbhum district, the Trinamool Congress supremo and Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee said the BJP won't be able to win the West Bengal elections using forces from Delhi

articles.title: U.S. aware of Iran’s capabilities, says Iran Envoy Mohammad Fathali
articles.description: The Envoy said the U.S. side made "unlawful" demands during the talks that led to the negotiations ending without results

articles.title: Quote of the day by Bad Bunny: ‘If a small-town boy like me…’
articles.description: The quote has been widely circulated in media reports and online posts. While its exact origin remains unclear, it reflects the artist’s well-documented journey from an ordinary job to international success.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Surrendering State’s rights to Centre is akin to slavery, says Chief Minister Stalin
articles.description: The Chief Minister says the people will deliver their verdict during the State’s April 23 Assembly election in the DMK’s favour, weighing its governance and welfare measures against the AIADMK-BJP combine, which has acted against the interests of Tamil Nadu; he says his party will not allow itself to be remote-controlled, and the BJP’s ‘double-engine sarkar’ slogan is a lie as the States ruled by it have not achieved any significant growth

articles.title: Nara Lokesh meets President Murmu, thanks her for approving Amaravati Capital Bill
articles.description: Lokesh thanks President for approving the Bill notifying Amaravati as the capital of Andhra Pradesh; presents her a coffee table book on Amaravati’s journey

articles.title: Delhi to Dehradun in 2.5 hours: PM Narendra Modi to inaugurate expressway
articles.description: A key feature of the project is its 12-km elevated wildlife corridor through Rajaji National Park with six animal underpasses

topStories.description: The Envoy said the U.S. side made "unlawful" demands during the talks that led to the negotiations ending without results

topStories.title: Turkiye Expresses Optimism On Iran-US Ceasefire Despite Negotiation Setback
topStories.description: Ankara flags nuclear deadlock and Hormuz tensions as key hurdles, even as it backs ongoing diplomatic efforts to end the conflict.

topStories.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Is Striking Fear Into The Heart Of Banks
topStories.description: Financial regulators in the U.K. are moving to evaluate the potential threats posed by the powerful AI tool, mirroring actions taken in the U.S. and Canada.

topStories.title: Hormuz Blockade + Limited Strikes On Iran: Trump's Plan After Pak Talks Fail
topStories.description: These additional measures come as options to break the current impasse in efforts to reach a lasting agreement with Tehran, following the collapse of direct negotiations in Pakistan over the weekend.

topStories.title: Iran Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf issues Hormuz warning to US using mathematical formula: Here's what it means
topStories.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf shared a mathematical formula to mock US President Donald Trump and warn Americans about the increasing oil prices, if the US military blocks the Strait of Hormuz. Here's what the formula means

topStories.title: Supreme Court refers Teesta Setalvad's plea for release of passport to 3-judge bench
topStories.description: On July 5, 2023, the top court had extended Ms. Setalvad’s interim protection from arrest in the case till July 19, 2023, while issuing a notice to the State on her appeal against the July 1, 2023, order of the high court

topStories.title: ‘We don’t support Trump blockade': How UK's Keir Starmer and Germany reacted
topStories.description: Keir Starmer on Monday said that his country will not be part of a US blockade of Iranian ports. Speaking with BBC radio, Keir Starmer said that ‘we are not supporting the blockade’ and the UK wouldn't be ‘getting dragged into the war.’

topStories.description: American pop star Britney Spears checked herself into a rehab facility, just over a month after she was arrested on suspicion of drunk driving. The development comes ahead of her 4 May court date. There has been no statement from the singer yet.

dailyNews.description: Addressing the 5th Edition of the ICA International Conference, the judge emphasised that dedication is key to career growth, cautioning that shorter working hours may limit learning and experience.

dailyNews.description: While US military says it will blockade Iranian ports only, move would have ripples worldwide, according to analysts.

dailyNews.title: ‘Himanta Biswa Sarma most corrupt’: Rahul Gandhi seeks probe into allegations levelled on Assam's CM wife
dailyNews.description: Rahul Gandhi also said that Congress stands with the Pawan Khera who had levelled the allegations on Assam CM's wife.

dailyNews.title: After Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks, netizens ask, ‘Who will pay hotel bills?’; Paresh Rawal takes ‘IMF’ dig
dailyNews.description: The negotiations between Washington and Tehran took place at the five-star Serena Hotel, one of the most secure locations in Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo calls sidelining 'disrespectful' as Bucks' season comes to end
dailyNews.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo expressed frustration with the Milwaukee Bucks for keeping him sidelined, saying players don't have control over their own playing time.

dailyNews.title: China says it will resume some ties with Taiwan after visit by opposition leader
dailyNews.description: China says it will restore some ties with Taiwan, including direct flights and aquaculture imports, following a visit by opposition leader Cheng Li-wun.

dailyNews.title: Discovery at Monticello reveals construction secrets Thomas Jefferson left out of maps and letters
dailyNews.description: Archaeologists uncovered a previously unknown brick kiln at Thomas Jefferson's Monticello, dating to a time before he wrote the Declaration of Independence.

dailyNews.title: Ex-NFL first-round pick suffers season-ending knee injury while attempting pro comeback in arena league
dailyNews.description: Ex-Denver Broncos NFL draft pick Paxton Lynch tore his LCL playing for the Colorado Spartans in the National Arena League, sidelining his comeback attempt.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo says he's unafraid of the Trump admin after president calls him 'terrible' on foreign policy
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV fires back at President Trump, saying his calls for peace are rooted in the Gospel and should not be treated as a political argument.

dailyNews.title: Former NFL player Chris Payton-Jones dead at 30 after Florida car crash
dailyNews.description: Officials say former NFL defensive back Chris Payton-Jones was killed at age 30 in a Florida car crash after his vehicle overturned and caught fire.

dailyNews.title: Pennsylvania town faces fallout from Trump's environmental rule rollback
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is ratcheting up attacks on environmental protections that Make America Healthy Again followers hold dear.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran war as Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: A marathon round of talks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend failed to produce a peace agreement, leading President Trump to announce a bloackade of the Strait of Hormuz. Imtiaz Tyab and Taurean Small have more.

dailyNews.title: Iran's parliament speaker says U.S. will be "nostalgic" for $4 gas as oil prices fuel inflation
dailyNews.description: Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf said Americans would soon be "nostalgic for $4-$5 gas" after President Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday. Taurean Small reports on the pain at the pump currently being felt across the United States.

dailyNews.title: After Criticizing Pope, Trump Posts Image of Himself as a Jesus-Like Figure
dailyNews.description: The image, posted on Truth Social, appeared to be A.I.-generated and depicts the president as a divine leader healing the sick.

dailyNews.title: ‘The Strangest Sleepover Ever’: Dutch Skeptical as Their Royals Visit Trump
dailyNews.description: The Dutch king and queen are set to stay at the White House on Monday night. At a time of trans-Atlantic tension, the Netherlands isn’t sure how it feels about that.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Military Transgender Ban Is Keeping Workers on Expensive Paid Leave
dailyNews.description: Highly trained service members have been put on paid leave for nearly a year as they wait for the military to decide their fate.

dailyNews.title: UK 'not supporting' U.S. Iran blockade as France's Macron confirms 'multinational' talks on the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump had signaled that other countries would help the U.S. in its blockade.

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts Pope Leo for criticism of U.S. foreign policy
dailyNews.description: Leo, the first U.S.-born pope who hails from Chicago, has condemned Trump's war effort with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on China as report suggests plans for arms shipment to Iran
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has threatened to impose a 50% tariff on China, after a report on Sunday that Beijing was preparing a weapons shipment to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
